title: Starter Demo Release Note: Full Lifecycle Traceability
summary: The starter workspace now demonstrates launch communication and post-release outcome review on the same canonical lifecycle item.

claims.claim: The starter workspace now demonstrates launch communication on the same canonical lifecycle item.

classification_rationale: The starter demo adds launch and outcome evidence so teams can inspect the full lifecycle trace before replacing the seeded data.
known_limitations: The starter release note is seeded onboarding data and must be replaced for real product launches.
followup_support_path: Use the starter delivery docs as the onboarding reference and replace seeded claims before real release communication.
